approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and make the pipeline self-cleaning without unsafe automation.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Intelligence Hygiene readback across atom-flow gaps, route noise/staleness, Scoper parked rows, and source-family blockers.
constraints: Do not write fresh atoms, chunks, facts, routes, backlog cards, Scoper cards, Portfolio records, or Current Sprint overlays from this readback.
Do not approve, apply, reject, snooze, reroute, or promote live action routes.
Do not auto-promote Director recommendations into backlog, Scoper, Portfolio, or Current Sprint.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, or public messages.
Do not run extraction, source sync, provider/model calls, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, or external writes.
Fail proof if stale atom flow is represented as repaired or green without source-backed fresh evidence.
